case_title: COLBURN, NEWTON vs. MURPHY, ANN et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLBURN, NEWTON AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, ANN MENDES, GAIL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-02-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-15-1996

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-05-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-05-1996, SECOND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF TO EXPLAIN WHY FAILED TO APPEAR FOR THE SECOND TIME & FAILED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES. CCP 575.2 FACT- FINDING INQUIRY AS TO PLTF'S ROLE IN HIS FAILURE TO COMPLY. COURT IMPOSES SANCTIONS OF $100 AGAINST PLTF. PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 9/30/96. IF NO APPEARANCE OR NO GOOD CAUSE, COURT WILL DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-02-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-02-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

attorneys.name: MANNING, LAWRENCE PAUL
